description_en: PMJDY helps people open a basic bank account with zero or low balance. It makes saving money, getting direct benefit transfer, and using digital payments easier. It is one of the main financial inclusion schemes in India.
description_hi: प्रधानमंत्री जन धन योजना के तहत वित्तीय सहायता और बैंकिंग से जुड़ी योजना.
eligibility_en: Any Indian resident who does not have a bank account
A valid Aadhaar or other KYC document is usually needed
The applicant should meet the bank's basic KYC rules
eligibility_hi: आवेदक के पास वैध पहचान पत्र और बैंक केवाईसी होना चाहिए
योजना के बैंक नियम और बुनियादी सत्यापन पूरे होने चाहिए
how_to_apply_en: Visit any bank branch that offers PMJDY accounts
Fill the account opening form and submit KYC documents
You can also ask a bank mitra or CSC for help
how_to_apply_hi: आधिकारिक पोर्टल या बैंक शाखा पर जाएं
फॉर्म भरें और केवाईसी दस्तावेज़ जमा करें

description_en: PMAY helps eligible families get affordable pucca housing. The scheme supports house construction, house purchase, or subsidy on home loans. It aims to give safe and permanent housing to families in need.
description_hi: प्रधानमंत्री आवास योजना के तहत बुनियादी ढांचे और सार्वजनिक सुविधा से जुड़ी योजना.
eligibility_en: The family should not already own a pucca house in many cases
Income category should fit the scheme rules
Women ownership or joint ownership is preferred in many cases
eligibility_hi: क्षेत्र, गांव, शहर या परियोजना योजना कवरेज में होना चाहिए
स्थानीय प्राधिकरण और विभागीय नियम लागू होते हैं
how_to_apply_en: Apply on the official PMAY portal or through the housing office
Fill the form with household and income details
Upload or submit KYC and property-related documents

description_en: PMUY gives LPG connection support to poor families. It helps women cook in a cleaner and safer way. The scheme reduces smoke from firewood and improves health in the kitchen.
description_hi: प्रधानमंत्री उज्ज्वला योजना के तहत यह एक लाभकारी सरकारी योजना है जो पात्र लाभार्थियों को सहायता देती है..

The applicant should usually be an adult woman from the family

description_en: PM-KISAN gives direct income support to eligible farmer families. The money helps farmers buy seeds, fertiliser, and other small farm needs. It is paid in fixed instalments through direct transfer.
description_hi: प्रधानमंत्री किसान सम्मान निधि के तहत कृषि और किसान सहायता से जुड़ी योजना.
eligibility_en: The family should have cultivable land records
Institutional land holders are usually not eligible
Income and exclusion rules of the scheme must be followed
eligibility_hi: किसान या खेती से जुड़ा लाभार्थी होना चाहिए

how_to_apply_en: Apply on the PM-KISAN portal or through the agriculture office
Complete eKYC and enter land and bank details
Check status online after submission

description_en: PM-JAY gives health cover for hospital treatment to eligible families. It helps reduce big medical bills and supports cashless care at empanelled hospitals. It is one of the largest health insurance schemes in India.
description_hi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधानमंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना के तहत स्वास्थ्य और इलाज सहायता से जुड़ी योजना.
eligibility_en: The family should be in the eligible beneficiary list
There is no need to pay an insurance premium for eligible users
The family should follow the scheme and state rules
eligibility_hi: लाभार्थी या परिवार योजना की कवरेज शर्तों में आना चाहिए
राज्य या राष्ट्रीय स्वास्थ्य नियम लागू हो सकते हैं

description_en: PMMY gives small loans to people who want to start or grow a tiny business. It supports shops, service units, and small manufacturing work. The scheme helps people get money without heavy security in many cases.
description_hi: प्रधानमंत्री मुद्रा योजना के तहत वित्तीय सहायता और बैंकिंग से जुड़ी योजना.
eligibility_en: The business should be a non-farm micro or small business
The applicant should be able to repay the loan
The applicant should be 18 years or older

योजना के बैंक नियम और बुनियादी सत्यापन पूरे होने चाहिए

description_hi: राष्ट्रीय पेंशन प्रणाली के तहत वित्तीय सहायता और बैंकिंग से जुड़ी योजना.

The applicant should have a bank account and KYC documents
The applicant should be able to make regular contributions
